title: rosa alpina var. pendulina
intro: Rosa alpina var. pendulina, also known as the Alpine Rose, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Rosa alpina var. pendulina is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as acting as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
